teamHeader.meetThePeopleBehindI18n: Meet the people behind i18n Benchmark. A diverse team united by a shared passion for great developer tools.
teamGrid.formerGoogleEngineerWith10: Former Google engineer with 10 years of experience building internationalization systems at scale.
teamGrid.specializesInJavascriptPerforma: Specializes in JavaScript performance optimization and benchmarking methodology. Previously at Vercel.
teamGrid.passionateAboutDeveloperExperie: Passionate about developer experience and education. Speaker at React Conf, JSConf, and i18nNext.
teamGrid.maintainsTheBenchmarkingInfrast: Maintains the benchmarking infrastructure and CI/CD pipeline. Open source contributor to Lingui.
teamGrid.ensuresStatisticalRigorInAll: Ensures statistical rigor in all benchmark results. PhD in Applied Statistics from MIT.
teamGrid.managesCommunityContributionsPa: Manages community contributions, partnerships, and events. Background in open source governance.
